subcodes.first_line: O Shirin! Ponder upon the grace and bounty of God, exalted be His glory, He whom the people regard as among the foremost scholars of the age [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شیرین در فضل و عنایت حق جل جلاله تفکر نما آنکه از اعظم علمای عصر بزعم ناس
subcodes.subjects: @many are called but few are chosen, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
